asset_name: Tesamorelin HIV Lipodystrophy Randomised Clinical Evidence

publication.title: Metabolic effects of a growth hormone-releasing factor in patients with HIV

study_design: Randomised clinical evidence in adults with HIV-associated abdominal fat accumulation.
population_or_model: Adults living with HIV and abdominal adiposity / lipodystrophy.
intervention_or_exposure: Tesamorelin versus placebo in the source trial; exact design details remain open pending complete primary capture.
outcomes: The primary trial identity supports clinically studied visceral-adipose-tissue reduction in the defined HIV-associated population.
Precise numerical extraction remains open in this build.
limitations: Complete direct article extraction not completed.
Findings cannot be generalised to ordinary obesity or cosmetic fat loss.
